_comment: These enforce that code-reviewer and code-simplifier agents both run
before any git commit is allowed.
To install: merge the 'hooks' object below into your .claude/settings.json.
See install-hooks.md in this directory for full instructions.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // ""' | { read -r st; case "$st" in *code-reviewer*) mkdir -p /tmp/claude-commit-gates && touch /tmp/claude-commit-gates/code-review ;; *code-simplifier*) mkdir -p /tmp/claude-commit-gates && touch /tmp/claude-commit-gates/code-simplifier ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in git*commit*) missing=''; [ ! -f /tmp/claude-commit-gates/code-review ] && missing='code-review'; [ ! -f /tmp/claude-commit-gates/code-simplifier ] && { [ -n "$missing" ] && missing="$missing, "; missing="${missing}code-simplifier"; }; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit blocked — missing quality gates: %s. Run /simplify and use the code-reviewer agent before committing."}}' "$missing"; fi ;; esac; }
